home.title: Welcome to MineTrack
home.subtitle: B2B platform for the rental of heavy mining machinery.

about.title: About MineTrack
about.body: Two-sided marketplace connecting Owners of mining machinery with Clients that need to rent equipment. Operations are supported by a shared IoT telemetry layer.
